---
title: Private investment in rural areas lags nonrural but is on the rise
description: Line chart showing private investment per capita trends for rural and
  nonrural areas.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-private-investment-per-capita-rural-nonrural/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Economic Indicators
  - Rural Development
tags:
  - SEC
  - Form D
  - Private Investment
  - Venture Capital
  - Rural vs. Nonrural
  - Line Chart
image: private_investment_per_capita_rural_nonrural.svg
chart:
  title: Private investment in rural areas lags nonrural but is on the rise
  chartType: line
  interactive: false
  source: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
  sourceUrl: https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&type=D
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - sec-form-d
usesPackages:
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart tracks private investment flows (from SEC Form D filings) on a per capita basis, comparing rural and nonrural areas.](./private_investment_per_capita_rural_nonrural.svg)

## Overview

This chart tracks private investment flows (from SEC Form D filings) on a per capita basis, comparing rural and nonrural areas.

## Key Findings

- Private investment per capita is significantly lower in rural areas
- Rural private investment has been increasing in recent years
- The rural-nonrural investment gap remains substantial

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/private_investment_per_capita.R` in the producing project.


::: {.callout-note}
## Dangling references

The following slugs are referenced by this project but do not yet have nodes in Dataverse. They are intentionally preserved as future content needs:

- `dataset/sec-form-d`
:::
